data.name: Reborn Warrior: Chronicles
data.detailed_description:
Reborn Warrior: Chronicles is a non-linear visual novel with TowerDefence elements, set in a world full of mystery and magic. The game tells about a guy who dies and is reborn, and from that moment his new journey begins. His goal is to gain the upper hand over 8 states and their main lords. Who will he be to them: friend, foe or lover?

  • An exciting plot that will be presented in different genres from horror to comedy

  • Non-linear chapters where every choice affects the outcome of the story.

  • Explore different endings, from death to deep friendship or even love relationships.

  • TowerDefence, which is mechanically linked to how you progress through the novella

  • 18+ content is present, which is disabled in the settings

After passing the prologue you will be opened one of the 8 locations of the novella. But don't hurry to choose the path, because to open the location you need to go through a series of levels in Tower Defense mechanics, collecting stars, which you will need to pass the novel.

TowerDefence Card Collection:

Each choice you make in the game will lead to a different ending, these in turn lead to the collection of unique cards that will affect your tactics in the game. Cards can be neutral or powerful, granting passive or active skills that can be used in battles.

This game contains sexually explicit scenes, including erotic dialog, innuendo and visuals of intimate content. In addition, the game contains scenes of violence and cruelty (blood, injuries, psychological pressure).

The content is intended exclusively for adult audiences (18+). If you wish, you can disable sensitive scenes in the game settings.

data.short_description: Our hero lived a normal life as a nerd. But after an unfortunate death he found himself on the battlefield of a fantasy world. Now his goal is to visit the domains of 8 beauties and fuc... take over their lands! Friendship or love, war or peace? It's up to you!

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統 *: Windows XP/Vista/7/8/10
  • 處理器: 2 Ghz Dual Core
  • 顯示卡: 512MB+
pc_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 作業系統 *: Windows XP/Vista/7/8/10
  • 處理器: 2 Ghz Dual Core
  • 顯示卡: 512MB+
